title: Monday Music Mix #17
summary: I’ve been busy like never before. Dealing with crises, a sea of emotions and that sinking feeling. But life goes on, and so must the show.
intro: I’ve been busy like never before. Dealing with crises, a sea of emotions and that sinking feeling. But life goes on, and so must the show.

I like sharing good music, music that makes me happy and I think I’m going to keep exploring, going down that path. While I do enjoy recommendations and unsolicitied advice, the objective of this blog is for me to share music that *I* like, so I’m going to leave it at just that. So without further ado.
Have something to say? Bark in the comments section, if you will.

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Seventeenth

I’ve been busy like never before. Dealing with crises, a sea of emotions and that sinking feeling. But life goes on, and so must the show.

I like sharing good music, music that makes me happy and I think I’m going to keep exploring, going down that path. While I do enjoy recommendations and unsolicitied advice, the objective of this blog is for me to share music that *I* like, so I’m going to leave it at just that. So without further ado.

Monday Thursday Music Mix: 17

Tracklist:

  1. Luísa Maita - Lero-Lero (DJ Tudo Remix)
  2. Mr. Little Jeans - The Suburbs (Arcade Fire cover)
  3. Nero Ft. Sub Focus - Promises
  4. Pamela Méndez - Bubble Bubble
  5. Battle Beyond The Stars - Desert
  6. Cassettes Won’t Listen - Perfect Day
  7. Foster the People - Call It What You Want
  8. Moonface - Fast Peter
  9. Dora Alexander - Travelers
  10. Bon Iver - Calgary
  11. The National - Exile Vilify
  12. Adele - Set Fire To The Rain (feat. Gilbere Forte) must listen - this isn’t the album version
  13. Man Man - Life Fantastic
  14. Purity Ring - Lofticries

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album (zip format) 

Have something to say? Bark in the comments section, if you will.
legacy.favoriteTrackCue: * Tracks in blue indicate my favourites
